basics.name: Riccardo Lincetto
basics.label: Computer Vision & Machine Learning Expert
basics.summary: Expert in computer vision (classical, neuromorphic), robotics, deep learning, LLM agents. Motivated by challenging problems, committed to continuous learning, highly organized. Experienced in both team and independent work.

work.name: Self-Employed
work.description: Computer Vision, Machine Learning and AI consultant and contractor
work.summary: Offering consulting services and working as an independent contractor on the state-of-the-art in computer vision, machine learning, and artificial intelligence. Exploring LLM-based agents and their applications.
highlights: Designed and developed a shop-the-look platform for an innovative advertising startup, including frontend, backend, and ML models for recommendations.
Fixed an event-based camera tracking system by separating tracking from identification tasks, and introducing a inter-camera handoff mechanism.
Decreased by 90% the training time of an image segmentation model for visual defect detection by designing an optimized data pipeline and a distributed training loop.
Design, developed and deployed in 3 weeks an LLM-based agent to act as an assistant for a platform for creators.
Delivered a UI-enabled LLM-based platform for lead validation, including frontend and backend.

work.name: CGTrader
work.description: Leader in 3D content marketplace and on-demand 3D model generation
work.position: Computer Vision and Machine Learning Engineer
work.summary: Researched and developed computer vision services (both discriminative and generative) for a 3D model marketplace and an image generation platform; managed machine learning infrastructure.
highlights: Led research on generative AI for 3D models (image-to-3d) over 9 months, beating state-of-the-art results by 10% on standard benchmarks by exploiting curated datasets from company assets
Designed from scratch, built a backend and launched in 3 months a text-to-image platform (https://cgdream.ai), using scalable microservices architecture
Increased revenue by 100k+ USD over 6 months for a 3D models marketplace (https://cgtrader.com) by training a quality-focused 3D-model regression system affecting the ranking of search results
Built and maintained a custom internal MLOps platform for a team of 5+ ML engineers

work.name: Sportradar
work.summary: Worked in the team dedicated to automating sports video analysis from broadcast TV.
highlights: Researched neural style transfer for enabling training models on synthetic data while bridging the domain gap with real data

work.name: Dronus
work.summary: Joined the startup as the 6th employee. Worked on computer vision for drones navigation and applications. Extended my skills to full-stack development and embedded systems.
highlights: Trained, quantized and deployed a neural network (yolo) for object detection on a qualcomm board for warehouse applications (data synthesis, training, on-device deployment, c++ inference post-processor)
Designed the system architecture for autonomous drone navigation, by leveraging px4
Tested integration of sensors (cameras, event-cameras, ToF cameras, radars) for drone navigation
Trained and deployed to the docking station embedded hardware (Jetson) a neural network for drone detection to guide the docking procedure
Researched neural network architectures for optical flow estimation on resource constrained settings
Developed the docking station hardware control on an Arduino board.
Developed and maintained the codebase for the ground control station proxy (MAVlink)
Research on SLAM algorithms for drone navigation

work.name: Akka
work.description: Consulting company for engineering and technology services in automotive and aerospace.
work.summary: Went through formation for consultants and worked with IT teams of a big car manufacturing company.
highlights: Soft-skills training for consultants
Worked as a functional owner of a fleet management service, namely driving efficiency report.

work.name: Sony
work.description: Internship at EuTEC (European Technology Center) in the Computational Imaging Group.
work.summary: Internship and Master Thesis on spectral imaging with event-based cameras.
highlights: Tested and benchmarked different event-based sensors.
Characterized the noise patterns at different illumination levels.
Synchronization with an electronically-controlled spectral filter for spectral imaging.
Researched video reconstruction from event data.
